result.stdout:
USAGE: pflex [--help] [--inputfile <path>] [--outputfile <path>]
             [--namespace <name>] [--extension <name>] [--version]

OPTIONS:

    --inputfile, -i <path>
                          path to proto files to build.
    --outputfile, -o <path>
                          path where to write final FSharp types bundle.
    --namespace, -n <name>
                          namespace that will be used in final bundle file.
    --extension, -e <name>
                          use extension generator name and args
    --version, -v         view pflex current version.
    --help                display this list of options.
